Retail Sales & Customer Service Roles Available Through NATS. (Click here) Previous Next ➤ For All DBT Related Queries ( Apprentices and Establishments ) ➤ NATS 2.0 Portal related queries: Students, Establishments & Institutions may call Eastern Region helpdesk no: 9773895329 Minister's Quote Minister's Quote "The apprenticeship training is one of the sources to develop skilled manpower for industry, by using training facilities available in the establishments without putting extra burden on exchequer to setup training infrastructure". Shri Dharmendra Pradhan Hon'ble Education Minister, Government of India Chairman's Message Chairman's Message I would like to begin by extending my sincere gratitude to all the stake holders implementing the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) for their continued support ...more Shri Anandrao V. Patil, IAS, AS Hon'ble Chairman, BOPT(ER), MoE, Government of India. Director's Desk Director's Desk As you all know, Board of Practical Training, Eastern Region, is an autonomous body under the Ministry of Education, Govt. of India and has played a crucial role in facilitating Apprenticeship Training ...more DR. S. M. EJAZ AHMAD Director, BOPT(ER), MoE, Government of India. Success Stories Success Stories Events Events Announcements Announcements Gallery Gallery Success Stories "www.mhrdnats.gov.in is a wonderful Govt. web portal for registration of Engineering Graduates, Diploma holders and General Graduates. The portal is very user friendly. We select diploma apprentices from the Govt. portal through Facilitate Training & Placement (FTP) for the aspired candidates. The contract creation process, acceptance by the apprentices, approved by the BOPT official is a very simple process. Any seek clarification, termination, extension of apprenticeship training, uploading of record of performance (RoP) is a very simple and easy process. The co-operation from BOPT officials is very cordial and we appreciate the friendly behavior of BOPT officials. We convey our sincere thanks to BOPT Oil India Limited Assam The National Apprenticeship Training Programme (NATS) by Govt. of India executed through the Board of Practical Training (BOPT), is commendable. It facilitates skill development through practical training, aligning education with industry requirements. The program's emphasis on apprenticeship nurtures a workforce that are job ready and equipped with real world experience. BOPT's execution underscores its commitment to bridging the gaps between academia and industry, contributing significantly to India's economic growth and human resource development. WEBFIL Limited West Bengal A trusted forum for Apprentice & Establishment, NATS help Establishment on saving their cost spend on fresh employees, we experience better mileage from the Apprentice in training tenure Skypro Technologies Pvt. Ltd. Bihar "First of all, I would like to thank Oil India Ltd. for giving me this opportunity. I am very privileged to be a part of this training. I gained so many knowledge and skill to take with the help of our instructor. This has met more than my expectations. NATS has provided valuable training opportunity for the diploma holders as it helped so many apprentices to showcase their abilities and skills. Through NATS, we the diploma holders got this opportunity to be a part of this training. NATS training expanded the knowledge of our discipline and gained skills which are mostly not taught during our course of study. At the end of this training NATS also provides us with a certificate of proficiency by Govt. of India which can be registered at all employment exchange across India as valid employment experience. This certificate helps us to get better opportunities in jobs and placement. PARISMITA SONOWAL Assam "I am very thankful to the NATS portal as through the NATS portal we are able to apply for the one-year apprenticeship training. The course provides the apprentices with the practical information and abilities needed for their job. Engineering & Diploma in Engineering and General Stream graduates can enroll in the NATS web portal for one year apprenticeship training. The scheme helps new talent become industry ready to meet organization's human resource needs. I am grateful to NATS for providing an opportunity to gain knowledge and upgrade myself. I got the opportunity to learn how to troubleshoot any kind of problems in different situations. As I joined as a fresher, I have developed my working skills and personality in a very good way. The training programme is really helpful for me as a beginner in professional field to understand the working process of each department. BAGMITA CHOUDHURY, Assam NATS provides a platform that not only nourished my technical, practical acumen, developed various inter-personal skills and attributes which helped in career and empowered technical and professional growth, but also helped me to get employment in desired field. DEBAJYOTI GHOSH West Bengal NATS gives a smooth transition from the world of education to the world of work environment. It also gives direct exposure to various technologies, concepts and friendly environment. It teaches values and ethics perfectly that are necessary in any workplace. This training also improves overall personality and confidence level of the trainees SUJOY BANERJEE WEST BENGAL NATS is very helpful for students. Specially for the Core Engineering Department Like Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering and Electrical Engineering. National Apprenticeship Training Scheme offers such an opportunity for students to get practical, skills-based training in their field of discipline, thereby gaining professional work experience in some of the best organizations in the Central, State and Private Sector. NSHM Knowledge Campus West Bengal "The NATS platform has streamlined the process for the students to enroll for the apprenticeship program. The students are equipped with the necessary technical skills to meet the challenges of the dynamic corporate environment. However, as far as the portal of NATS is concerned, it may be made more user friendly Tripura Institute of Technology Tripura NATS portal serves as a platform for OPTCL to register and manage apprenticeship opportunities. From NATS portal OPTCL is able to select suitable candidates for apprenticeship by searching candidates based on specific criteria and qualifications. NATS enhances the productivity of establishment and provides financial support to the industries by way of reimbursing 50% of Govt. prescribed minimum stipend paid to the apprentices. It is a very good initiative of Govt. of India for skill development. Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited (OPTCL) Odisha The National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) is a transformative force in our nation's progress. By imparting practical skills to young talents, NATS is shaping a skilled workforce aligned with industry needs. This initiative bridges education and hands-on application, fostering innovation. With Stipends, Certificates and Employability boost, NATS empowers youth and benefits employers. A cornerstone of skill development, NATS is propelling us towards a stronger, more prosperous nation GAIL (India) Limited Jharkhand NATS is beneficial in several ways. Some of the key features are - students get trained in some of the best Central, State and Private sector organizations. Also, the courses provide students with the practical information and abilities needed for their line of job.
